name: Taste Skill
description_en: A Claude Code plugin that gives coding agents design taste—a bundle of frontend skills (brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, stitch, brandkit, image-to-code, imagegen, and more) to stop agents from generating boring, generic UI.
description_zh: 一个 Claude Code 插件，为编码 agent 注入设计「品味」——打包多个前端技能(brutalist、minimalist、soft、redesign、stitch、brandkit、image-to-code、imagegen 等)，让 agent 不再生成乏味、千篇一律的 UI。
long_en: A Claude Code plugin packaging more than a dozen frontend-design skills, each invocable by name after install. It offers distinct aesthetic directions (brutalist, minimalist, soft, Swiss/stitch), brand-kit and redesign helpers, and image-to-code / image-generation workflows—steering agents toward deliberate, non-generic interfaces.
long_zh: 一个 Claude Code 插件，打包十多个前端设计技能，安装后每个均可按名调用。提供多种鲜明的美学方向(brutalist、minimalist、soft、瑞士/stitch)、品牌套件与重设计助手，以及 image-to-code / 图像生成工作流——引导 agent 做出有意图、不千篇一律的界面。
sec_note_en: MIT-licensed; runs locally as a Claude Code plugin bundling frontend-design skills. It guides UI generation and produces frontend code—review generated code before shipping.
sec_note_zh: MIT 许可；作为 Claude Code 插件在本地运行，打包多个前端设计技能。它指导 UI 生成并产出前端代码——上线前请审阅生成的代码。
